note: SYNTHETIC locked-matrix mock for the Classifier Eval Suite. Numbers are design placeholders, not measured eval results. Pass A metrics (ai_native accuracy, calibration, confidence, robustness) are identical across Pass B efforts within each model, matching the bank-once Pass A design. Calibration blocks (reliability bins, ECE, selective curve, mean confidence, share above 0.9) were all computed from the same 100 synthetic per-row confidence/correctness pairs per model, so every derived number recomputes from every other; nano seeds the documented early signal (ECE near 0.077, top-half confidence fully correct). Cost blocks + production_cost_estimate ladders were generated with evals.cost_extrapolate.extrapolate_production_cost on synthetic token totals, so the popover arithmetic recomputes exactly to the displayed projected $. Replace by loading real evals/runs/*/scored.json after the paid sweep.

assumptions.stacking: batch_discount on all tokens; cache_discount additionally on cached input portion (cached input = sync_input * batch * cache)

1_golden_sync.label: golden_set_actual_sync_list
1_golden_sync.note: Sync list price on measured tokens. Reasoning tokens are inside output_tokens. Cache discount not applied at this step.

2_cache.label: cache_adjustment
2_cache.note: Measured cached_tokens from this run. Cached input billed at 50% of sync input rate.

3_batch.label: batch_adjustment
3_batch.note: Production Batch API at 50% of sync. Applied to the cache-adjusted golden total.

4_scale.label: scale_to_production_n
4_scale.note: Linear scale × (41076 / 100). Assumes golden-set token mix and measured cache rate hold at production volume.
